name: Push-up
instructions: Set up with proper starting position.
Maintain a neutral spine and brace your core.
Perform the movement through a controlled range of motion.
Return slowly to the starting position.
commonMistakes: Using excessive momentum.
Sacrificing form to lift more weight.
Not using a full range of motion.
